goals.title: 홈 페이지를 docs/mockups/homepage_3/mockups/home_pathi_reference.html 디자인에...
goals.objective: 홈 페이지를 docs/mockups/homepage_3/mockups/home_pathi_reference.html 디자인에 맞게 변경하고 모든 홈/내비 버튼을 실제 라우트 또는 섹션 기능으로 연결한다. HEAVY: 전역 내비와 홈 랜딩 UI를 변경하는 브라우저 표면 작업이며 사용자 요청이 기준 목업 매칭과 버튼 기능 연결을 요구한다. Success criteria: c1 desktop/mobile home visually matches the Pathi reference structure with real DOM and assets; c2 every visible home/header CTA navigates to the intended route or in-page section; c3 existing logged-in home/auth landing behavior remains usable.

successCriteria.scenario: happy path for: 홈 페이지를 docs/mockups/homepage_3/mockups/home_pathi_reference.html 디자인에 맞게 변경하고...
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with observable happy-path proof for goal 1.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Final visual evidence refreshed: actual-desktop.png and actual-mobile.png captured from strict-port Vite 5296; reference screenshots captured from docs/mockups/homepage_3/mockups/home_pathi_reference.html; diff-desktop.json/diff-mobile.json and diff PNGs generated with Pillow; manual image inspection found no overlap or unreadable layout.

successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with boundary or malformed-input proof for: 홈 페이지를 docs/mockups/homepage_3/mockups/home_pathi_reference.html 디자인에 맞게 변경하고....
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Final button evidence refreshed in action-log.json: nav hrefs 서비스 소개/#features, 기능/#features, 이용 방법/#how, 커뮤니티/community, 대시보드/dashboard, 로그인/login, 회원가입/login?mode=signup; clicks verified section hashes, signup tab visible, authed 분석 시작하기 -> /analyze/new, mobile 이용 방법 -> #how; pageErrors empty.

successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with regression proof for neighboring behavior after: 홈 페이지를 docs/mockups/homepage_3/mockups/home_pathi_reference.html 디자인에 맞게 변경하고....
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Final regression evidence refreshed: npm run build passed, npx playwright test tests/e2e/home.spec.js passed 4/4, npm test passed frontend design verification, git diff --check reported no whitespace errors beyond CRLF conversion warnings; strict QA port 5296 cleanup verified with no LISTENING process.

goals.evidence: Homepage reference redesign implemented and verified against current visual/button/test evidence.
